violations.text: The 2 door traulsen and the mechanical dishwasher located in the kitchen area were not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2026
The ceiling tiles above the three bay sink were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2026

The floors under the 3-bay sink, and cafeteria have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The door #18, #19, and #20 to the outside, located in the kitchen, and gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The ceiling above the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The floor in the gym area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

2 door reach-in was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were evaluated in the unit and were either moved to a working unit or disposed of. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The door #18, #19, and #20 to the outside, located in the kitchen, and gym, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The ceiling above the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The floor under the dishwasher area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the gym and kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024
The ceiling tiles above the dish washing area were observed in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024

The ceiling tile above the dish area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and droppings behind equipment and behind stove in teachers room. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

The door to the outside, located at door 18, 19, and door 20 is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2023
